name: Vega
description: Integrates with Vega's Security Analytics Mesh platform for federated search across distributed data sources, AI-native threat detection, alert triage, and investigation support without requiring data migration

actions.name: Federated Search
actions.description: Execute a federated search query across all connected data sources without data migration. Supports structured queries and natural language via Lyra AI.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query (structured query syntax or natural language)

parameters.name: data_sources
parameters.description: List of data source IDs to search across. Omit to search all connected sources.

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Time range filter with 'start' and 'end' ISO 8601 timestamps

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: List Detections
actions.description: Retrieve detections (alerts) from the Vega platform with optional severity and status filters

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity: critical, high, medium, low, informational

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: open, investigating, resolved, dismissed

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Time range shorthand: 1h, 6h, 24h, 7d, 30d

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of detections to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset

actions.name: Get Detection Details
actions.description: Retrieve full details for a specific detection including timeline, entities, and related events

parameters.name: detection_id
parameters.description: Unique detection identifier

parameters.name: include_events
parameters.description: Include raw events that triggered the detection

actions.name: Update Detection Status
actions.description: Update the status, severity, or assignment of a detection

parameters.name: detection_id
parameters.description: Unique detection identifier

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status: open, investigating, resolved, dismissed

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Updated severity: critical, high, medium, low, informational

parameters.name: assigned_to
parameters.description: User or team to assign this detection to

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Analyst notes or comments

actions.name: List Detection Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all configured detection rules and their current status

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Filter by enabled/disabled status

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by rule category (e.g., malware, lateral_movement, exfiltration)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rules to return

actions.name: Create Detection Rule
actions.description: Deploy a new detection rule across the analytics mesh

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Detection rule name

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Rule description

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Detection query logic

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Default severity for triggered detections: critical, high, medium, low

parameters.name: data_sources
parameters.description: Data sources to run this rule against

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Whether the rule is active immediately

parameters.name: mitre_tactics
parameters.description: MITRE ATT&CK tactics this rule maps to

actions.name: List Data Sources
actions.description: List all connected data sources in the analytics mesh with health and status information

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by connection status: connected, degraded, disconnected

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by source type: cloud, siem, edr, network, saas, data_lake

actions.name: Lookup Entity
actions.description: Search across all data sources for activity related to a specific entity (IP, domain, user, hash)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Entity value to look up (IP address, domain, username, file hash, etc.)

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Entity type hint: ip, domain, hash, email, user, host. Auto-detected if omitted.

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Time range to search: 1h, 6h, 24h, 7d, 30d, 90d

actions.name: AI Triage Detection
actions.description: Submit a detection to Vega's Lyra AI engine for automated triage, severity assessment, and recommended response actions

parameters.name: detection_id
parameters.description: Detection ID to triage

parameters.name: include_recommendations
parameters.description: Include AI-generated response action recommendations

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Additional context to inform AI triage (e.g., asset criticality, user role)
